form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.71) at Ballarat in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 400m at Geelong beaten 6 lengths (23.13) behind Aussie Wagyu in a Grade 5 on March 27. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.58) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 6 lengths. Has two successes and two minors from seven starts from box 3. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 3.5 lengths third (22.19) over 390m at this track and making it two placings on end. Hasn't been far away. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 390m. Last start finished 4th in a Special conditions H on March 31 over 425m at Bendigo behind Aston Yamato beaten 4.5 lengths (24.07). Scored two on the trot prior to last start. Can return to winning form.
